title: epipactis helleborine f. dilatata
intro: Epipactis helleborine f. dilatata, also known as the narrow-leaved helleborine or dilated helleborine, is a subspecies of the orchid Epipactis helleborine, a type of terrestrial orchid that belongs to the family Orchidaceae. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antiviral properties. The health benefits of Epipactis helleborine f. dilatata include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve immune function, and exhibit antioxidant activity, making it a valuable natural remedy for various health issues. The plant can be prepared in various herbal forms, such as infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat a range of health conditions, including respiratory problems and skin infections.
